title: Executive Order 5744—Power-Site Restoration No. 465, Colorado
text:
So much of the orders of May 15, 1909, creating Temporary Power-Site Withdrawal No. 2, and July 2, 1910, creating Power-Site Reserve No. 2, as affects the lands hereinafter described, is hereby revoked:
New Mexico Meridian
T. 43 N., R. 6 W., sec. 31, all.
HERBERT HOOVER
The White House,
November 7, 1931.
